connections.gloss: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon.

connections.def: probably from 142 (perhaps with 1 (as a particle of union) prefixed); a chariot (as raised or fitted together (compare 719)):--chariot. see GREEK for 142 see GREEK for 1 see GREEK for

connections.gloss: bring (on (horse-) back), carry, get (oneself) up, on (horse-) back, put, (cause to, make to) ride (in a chariot, on, -r), set.
